message:
feat(perf): add Deadline type for fail-open budget enforcement (git_safety_guard-99e.14)

Add Deadline struct to perf module for tracking operation time limits.
This enables fail-open behavior when hook evaluation exceeds the budget.

Key additions:
- Deadline struct with start time and max duration tracking
- is_exceeded(), remaining(), elapsed() methods
- has_budget_for() to check if an operation fits in remaining time
- HOOK_EVALUATION_BUDGET and HOOK_EVALUATION_BUDGET_MS constants
- Unit tests for all Deadline functionality

Also:
- Make TraceCollector::set_budget_skip() const fn
- Comment out unimplemented deadline-aware evaluator exports
- Fix clippy warnings (const fn, is_some_and)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
